name_en: 【Top Grade Replica】New Arrival🎉1BH082 Shoulder Bag🎉 This versatile handbag is crafted from leather, featuring a simple and exquisite design. The webbed shoulder strap is embellished with a letter logo, adding a dynamic touch. It comes with two interchangeable and adjustable long shoulder straps. The combination of LOGO fabric webbing and cowhide is perfect 😘, offering versatile styling for different occasions and outfits 😘. It has ample capacity with multiple compartments and a super soft feel. Get yours now!🎉 Dimensions: 22x14.5x8.5cm!
